title: Policy: Policy Applied - Settings Locked
scenario: Policy-locked settings in Poly Studio Mobile app update to new values when a new policy is applied, while remaining greyed out
steps: 1. On the Lens Cloud tenant, create a policy that affects one or more settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) and apply it to the target device.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the device.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
4. Observe the affected settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
5. Verify that the affected settings are greyed out/locked and display the values defined in the policy.
8. On the Lens Cloud tenant, create a new policy that affects the same settings but with different values, and apply it to the device.
9. In the Poly Studio Mobile app, navigate back to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
11. Create a policy on the Lens Cloud tenant that affects all available settings in the Poly Studio Mobile app and apply it to the device.
12. In the Poly Studio Mobile app, navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
expected: - Step 5: The affected settings are greyed out/locked and display the values from the policy. - Step 7: A dialog appears informing the user that the setting is locked. - Step 10: The affected settings remain locked/greyed out, but now display the new values from the new policy. - Step 13: All settings are locked/greyed out and display the values from the policy.
